hero.title: Korvoni Umed
hero.subtitle: Championing Women's Rights, Combating Gender-Based Violence and Human Trafficking in Tajikistan since 2009

shelter.title: Crisis Center & Rehabilitation
shelter.description: We provide immediate support and shelter to women in crisis. Our comprehensive rehabilitation includes legal aid, medical assistance, and psychological counseling to help victims heal and rebuild their lives.

training.title: Education & Economic Empowerment
training.description: Our educational initiatives include courses and vocational training — sewing, cooking, confectionery and jewelry making — empowering vulnerable women with skills for economic independence and self-sufficiency.

cafe.title: Social Cafe Chatr
cafe.description: A unique social enterprise where former beneficiaries work and gain professional experience. All profits go toward maintaining the shelter and supporting our programs.

awareness.title: Community Awareness & Advocacy
awareness.description: We organize events, information campaigns and community outreach to educate about the prevention of domestic violence, human trafficking and the importance of women's rights.

euTraining.title: EU-Funded Training Centers
euTraining.description: 725 students receive free training in culinary arts and sewing at centers in Dushanbe, Varzob and Kulob, supported by the European Union.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Since 2009, Caravan of Hope (Korvoni Umed), a remarkable woman-led organization in Tajikistan, has been at the forefront of advocating for women's rights and fighting against gender-based violence and human trafficking. With unwavering dedication, we have implemented numerous impactful projects that have significantly improved the lives of women and girls across the country.
about.partners: Our success would not be possible without the generous support of the European Union, U.S. Embassy in Dushanbe, Department of State Bureau of International Narcotics & Law Enforcement Affairs (INL), Embassy of the Netherlands in Central Asia, Danish Relief and Development, the United Nations (UN), UNFPA, UNICEF, and UN Women.
about.missionText: Our mission is to end violence against women and girls. We have developed a robust framework for supporting victims of domestic violence and human trafficking, providing comprehensive rehabilitation services encompassing legal, medical, and psychological support — ensuring that victims receive the holistic care they need to heal and rebuild their lives.
about.historyText: The organization was founded in 2009 by Umeda Sadriddinova in Dushanbe. Over the years, we have helped hundreds of women and their children find safety, gain new skills, and start a new life. Our comprehensive strategy includes crisis center operations, economic sustainability programs, and capacity-building activities.
about.shelterDesc: Comprehensive rehabilitation — legal aid, medical assistance, and psychological counseling for women victims of domestic violence and human trafficking.
about.trainingDesc: Educational and capacity-building initiatives empowering vulnerable women with skills for economic independence.
about.cafeDesc: Social cafe Chatr — a social enterprise where former beneficiaries work, with profits funding the shelter.
about.awarenessDesc: Community awareness campaigns and collaborative efforts with local leaders and government bodies to promote gender equality.
about.euTrainingDesc: With European Union support, 725 students receive free culinary arts and sewing training at centers in Dushanbe, Varzob and Kulob.
about.joinText: Support Caravan of Hope to help create a future where every woman and girl can live free from violence and discrimination. Together, we can make a tangible difference.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: A comprehensive approach to ending gender-based violence and combating human trafficking

rehabilitation.title: Comprehensive Rehabilitation Services
rehabilitation.description: Offering legal aid, medical assistance, and psychological counseling to women victims of domestic violence and human trafficking. We provide immediate support, safe shelter, and holistic care.

education.title: Education & Capacity Building
education.description: Conducting courses and training to empower vulnerable women with the skills and knowledge needed for economic independence and self-sufficiency. Vocational programs include sewing, cooking, confectionery, and jewelry making.

awareness.title: Community Awareness Campaigns
awareness.description: Organizing events and information drives to educate community members about the prevention of domestic violence, human trafficking and the importance of women's rights.

collaboration.title: Collaboration with Government
collaboration.description: Working closely with local leaders, civil servants, and men to promote gender equality and ensure equal opportunities for women in society.

crisis.title: Crisis Center Operations
crisis.description: Providing immediate support and safe shelter to women in crisis — a safe space where women and their children can begin their journey to recovery.

economic.title: Economic Sustainability Programs
economic.description: Helping women achieve financial independence through vocational training, job placement services, and our social enterprise cafe Chatr.

request.error: Error submitting. Please try again later.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: Life-changing initiatives for women and children in Tajikistan — from crisis centers to economic empowerment and community awareness.

chatr.title: Café Chatr
chatr.subtitle: A social café empowering women to reclaim their independence and build a brighter future

mission.title: The Mission Behind the Brew
mission.text: Café Chatr is a unique social enterprise nestled in the heart of Dushanbe. It is a haven for women who have been impacted by gender-based violence and human trafficking. Through the support of the Korvoni Umed organization, these women receive essential training and employment opportunities, empowering them to reclaim their lives and build a sustainable future.

empowerment.title: Empowerment Through Employment
empowerment.text: The employment model at Café Chatr provides women with more than just a job. It offers a lifeline, a chance to gain financial independence, and a supportive community where they can rebuild their self-esteem and confidence.

learning.title: A Learning Environment
learning.text: Café Chatr is a learning environment where women develop new skills — from culinary arts and customer service to management and financial literacy — equipping them with the tools they need to succeed both professionally and personally.

connections.title: Building Connections
connections.text: The café serves as a space where women connect with customers and the broader community. These interactions help them improve their social skills and foster a sense of belonging and support.

sustainability.title: Creating Sustainable Futures
sustainability.text: Through their work at Café Chatr, women earn a sustainable income that helps them achieve financial stability and independence. Every cup of coffee served represents the possibility of a new beginning.

cta.title: Join the Movement
cta.text: When you visit Café Chatr, you're not just enjoying a delicious meal or a perfect cup of coffee — you're participating in a movement that empowers women and transforms lives. Follow us on social media.

map.title: Help Services Map
map.description: Find the nearest help services in Dushanbe.

donate.title: Support the Organization
donate.description: Your contribution helps us continue supporting women and children. Together, we can create a world where every woman and girl can live free from violence and discrimination.
